title: Figma to React & Tailwind App
description: If you have a design ready in Figma, I can turn it into clean, pixel-perfect React components. I write structured Tailwind CSS from scratch to ensure everything adapts beautifully and runs smoothly on phones, tablets, and desktops.

title: TypeScript & Secure API Integration
description: I connect your user interface to external web services using Axios and TypeScript to handle live data feeds safely. By routing sensitive requests through Vercel serverless functions, I keep your private API keys hidden from browser inspection.

title: Performance & Clean UI Development
description: I build websites that load instantly and are easy for everyone to use. By using correct structural tags and keeping the code optimized, I ensure your project achieves excellent PageSpeed Insight scores and ranks well on search engines.
